name: truffl
description: Truffl merchant dashboard and voice recovery automation platform.

scripts.dev: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @truffl/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @truffl/api
scripts.dev:worker: npm run build:packages && npm run dev --workspace @truffl/worker
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build --workspace @truffl/api && npm run build --workspace @truffl/worker && npm run build --workspace @truffl/web
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @truffl/core && npm run build --workspace @truffl/config && npm run build --workspace @truffl/connectors && npm run build --workspace @truffl/database
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/core && npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/config && npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/connectors && npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/database && npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/worker && npm run typecheck --workspace @truffl/web
